name: There's Nothing to Worry About!
overview: Short-lived sketch show which is notable today for early appearances by Ben Elton, Dame Emma Thompson, Stephen Fry, and Hugh Laurie. Originally broadcast only in the Granada television area, it was refashioned as Alfresco (1983) for national broadcasting.

trailers.title: There's Nothing to Worry About! Episode 3 (Alfresco pilot episode)
